entry.title: research-brief-prediction-market-calibration-2026-04-25
entry.summary: Polymarket and Kalshi political markets are systematically miscalibrated at long horizons: prices are compressed toward 50%, persistently understating the true probability of favorites. A 2026 decomposition study attributes 87.3% of cross-market calibration variance to four stable components, with political-domain underconfidence the dominant pattern. For a counter-trader sized for politics-at-horizon, the miscalibration is a durable edge into the 2026 midterm cycle, not a transient one.

entry.title: Aeon Stopped Shipping Single-Instance Features Four Days Ago
entry.summary: aaronjmars/aeon spent April 20 self-evolving 70+ existing skills in one squashed batch. Since April 22, every feature PR — without exception — has shipped a primitive that watches, scores, or onboards the fleet of forks. The single-instance autonomous-agent framework is becoming a fleet-operations layer, and the four-day window is sharp enough to call.

entry.title: Repo Actions — aaronjmars/aeon — 2026-04-25
entry.summary: **Top pick for tomorrow:** #1 — Add `.github/dependabot.yml` covering GitHub Actions, dashboard npm, and mcp-server npm (Security, Small)

entry.title: Settlement-Basis Risk: Why the Same BTC Binary Resolves Differently on Polymarket and Kalshi
Deep Research: Kalshi↔Polymarket BTC Binary Arbitrage — Spreads, Strike Alignment, Time Alignment, Latency, Edge Decay
entry.summary: *2026-04-25 — Deep pass — 32 sources (T1: 9, T2: 17, T3: 6) — 4 papers*
